title: neomammillaria microhelia
intro: Neomammillaria microhelia, also known as a type of cactus, is a succulent plant species native to Mexico. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neomammillaria microhelia include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. However, I couldn't find information on herbal preparations using this plant.
